name: child-leaf-into-overlay
_note: The working childing path, as contrast to child-leaf-onto-leaf.json. An overlay IS a container kind, so dropping the text onto it reparents (the text becomes overlay/children[0]). Watch for the cyan drop-target highlight on the overlay during the drag and the depth change in the tree afterward. This is the spec-faithful way to stack a label on top of a radial fill: wrap both in an overlay.
